title: sedum glaebosum
intro: Sedum glaebosum, also known as the Globe Sedum, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sedum glaebosum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its potential to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
